title: EcoRI/BamHI restriction ligation produces a GenBank artifact
objective: Import a synthetic EcoRI/BamHI vector and insert, simulate directional restriction ligation, and verify the GenBank product artifact.
constraints: Call validate_workspace with checkSequenceDigests=true after edit_sequence.
Do not infer amino-acid consequences from edit_sequence alone.

inputs.source: Synthetic circular vector with unique EcoRI and BamHI sites; matches W3 restriction-ligation test geometry.
Synthetic linear insert with unique EcoRI and BamHI sites; matches W3 restriction-ligation test geometry.

toolPlan.purpose: Import task input into a fresh workspace.
Verify workspace JSON and stored sequence digest consistency.

caveats: This task tests shipped restriction-ligation simulation only; Gibson and Golden Gate are not in v0 scope.
